name: easyJet PLC
description: Europe's leading low-cost airline with 356 Airbus A320 family aircraft, 93.4m passengers in FY2025. Also operates easyJet holidays (£250m PBT). Net cash £602m, investment grade rated.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £10,106m in FY2025 (+9%). Capacity 104m seats (+4%). easyJet holidays £1,440m revenue (+27%). 17 new A320neo deliveries in FY26. Medium-term target >£1bn PBT.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Headline EBIT margin 7.0% (up from 6.4%). CASK ex-fuel down 1% to 4.46p. Fleet modernisation with NEO 15-25% more fuel efficient. Holidays now 38% of Group PBT at £250m.
assumptions.risks: Fuel price volatility (24% of costs), ATC delays, winter losses, SAF mandates, geopolitical risks, FX exposure. COVID showed extreme downside (FY2021 loss £1,036m).
assumptions.catalyst: Fleet upgauging (290 new aircraft on order), holidays target £450m PBT by FY30, ROCE 18.0%, net cash £602m, investment grade (Baa2/BBB+).
